displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Specially mixed flour for premium noodles is used to bring a chewy texture to the noodles.

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
1. Boil 550ml (about 2 1/4 cup) of water
2. Add noodles, soup base and vegetable mix
3. Cook for 4 minutes - 5 minutes, stirring occasionally
4. Remove from heat and serve

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value:
• Noodles: Wheat Flour (Cereal containing Gluten), Palm Oil, Potato Starch, Salt, Acidity Regulator (E501, E500), Vegetable Flavour Sauce (Malt Syrup, Onion, Garlic), Colour (E101(I)), Tea Extract
• Soup Powder: Salt, Flavour Enhancer (E621, E635), Hydrolysed Vegetable Protein (Soya Bean Product), Chilli Powder, Spices, Sugar, Soya Bean Paste Powder (Soya Bean Product), Yeast Extract, Vegetable Oil, Mushroom, Corn Flour, Chilli Extract, Malt Syrup, Maltodextrin, Colour (E150A)
• Vegetables: Dehydrated Chives, Dehydrated Mushroom, Dehydrated Carrot, Dehydrated Red Pepper

metaData.Key Information:
• Perfect Korean famous taste
• Great small cup sized noodle that is good for snacking
metaData.Preparation:
Cooking directions:
• For hot water:
1. Open lid halfway and add soup base
2. Pour hot water up to the line inside
3. Close lid for 3 minutes
4. Stir well and serve
• For microwave:
1. Completely remove lid
2. Pour room temperature water up to the line inside
3. Microwave for 3 minutes
4. Stir well and ready to serve

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodles: Wheat Flour (77%), Palm Oil [Antioxidants (306, 320, 321)], Salt, Acidity Regulators (450, 451, 501, 500), Stabilisers (412, 414), Emulsifier (471)
• Seasoning powder: Salt, Flavour Enhancers (621, 635), Spices, Soya Sauce Powder (Soya, Wheat, Salt), Sugar, Flavouring Powder (Yeast Extract, Chicken Meat Powder), Hydrolysed Plant Protein [Soya, Stabiliser (1400)], Colours (150c, 160c), Spring Onion, Acidity Regulator (330), Anti-caking Agents (535, 536)
• Seasoning oil: Sesame Oil, Palm Oil, Spices, Colour (160c)
metaData.Key Information:
• Springy bite noodles
• Flavourful sesame with a hint of chilli
• Convenient to eat and easy to prepare
metaData.Preparation:
• Cooking instructions
1. Add noodles to 450ml of boiling water, simmer for 3 minutes and stir occasionally
2. Remove from heat, add seasoning powder and seasoning oil
3. Stir well and serve

metaData.Ingredients:
• Noodles: Wheat Flour (contains Gluten), Refined Palm Oil (contains Permitted Antioxidant TBHQ), Guargum, Salt, Contains Acidity Regulators (Potassium Carbonate, Sodium Polyphosphate, Sodium Carbonate) as Permitted Food Conditioners and contains Permitted Coloring (Tartrazine)
• Seasoning powder: Sugar, Salt, Monosodium Glutamate, Disodium Inosinate, Disodium Guanylate and Yeast Extract as Permitted Flavour Enhancers, Garlic Powder, Onion Powder, Caramel and Artificial Chicken Flavour, Chili Powder, Fried Onion
• Seasoning Oil: Refined Palm Olein (contains Permitted Antioxidant TBHQ), Chili, Garlic, Onion, Paprika
• Sweet Soy Sauce: Sugar, Water, Soy, Wheat, Salt, Herbs and Spices, Sesame Oil
• Contains soy bean, and sesame
• All additives used are of plant and synthetic origin
metaData.Key Information: Offers a rich chili and spice aroma complete with chili powder and spicy seasoning oil, resulting in a new and interesting experience in enjoying Indomie.
metaData.Preparation:
1. Cook noodles in boiling water and simmer for 3 minutes
2. Mix the seasoning powder, seasoning oil, sweet soy sauce on a plate, while noodles is being cooked
3. Drain well
4. Mix well with all the seasonings
5. Garnish with fried onion and enjoy your delicious fried noodles
